verses.text: <ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Dà</rt></ruby><ruby>卫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>王<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>年<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nián</rt></ruby><ruby>纪<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>老<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>迈<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mài</rt></ruby>，<ruby>虽<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">suī</rt></ruby><ruby>用<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>被<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bèi</rt></ruby><ruby>遮<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhē</rt></ruby><ruby>盖<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡài</rt></ruby>，<ruby>仍<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>觉<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jué</rt></ruby><ruby>暖<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nuǎn</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>臣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chén</rt></ruby><ruby>仆<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pú</rt></ruby><ruby>对<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">duì</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Bù</rt></ruby><ruby>如<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rú</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>王<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>寻<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xún</rt></ruby><ruby>找<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>处<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>女<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǚ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>使<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>她<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>伺<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cì</rt></ruby><ruby>候<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hou</rt></ruby><ruby>王<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wánɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>奉<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>养<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>王<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wánɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>睡<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuì</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>王<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>怀<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huái</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>好<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>叫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>王<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>暖<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nuǎn</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>于<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yú</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>色<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sè</rt></ruby><ruby>列<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">liè</rt></ruby><ruby>全<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">quán</rt></ruby><ruby>境<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>寻<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xún</rt></ruby><ruby>找<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>美<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">měi</rt></ruby><ruby>貌<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mào</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>童<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>女<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǚ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>寻<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xún</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>书<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Shū</rt></ruby><ruby>念<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">niàn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>童<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>女<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǚ</rt></ruby><ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yà</rt></ruby><ruby>比<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>煞<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shā</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>带<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dài</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>王<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">li</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>童<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>女<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǚ</rt></ruby><ruby>极<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jí</rt></ruby><ruby>其<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qí</rt></ruby><ruby>美<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">měi</rt></ruby><ruby>貌<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mào</rt></ruby>，<ruby>她<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>奉<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>养<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>王<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wánɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>伺<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cì</rt></ruby><ruby>候<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hou</rt></ruby><ruby>王<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wánɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>王<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>却<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">què</rt></ruby><ruby>没<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">méi</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>她<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>亲<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qīn</rt></ruby><ruby>近<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jìn</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Nà</rt></ruby><ruby>时<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shí</rt></ruby>，<ruby>哈<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Hā</rt></ruby><ruby>及<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jí</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>儿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yà</rt></ruby><ruby>多<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">duō</rt></ruby><ruby>尼<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ní</rt></ruby><ruby>雅<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>自<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zì</rt></ruby><ruby>尊<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zūn</rt></ruby>，<ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>必<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bì</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>王<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wánɡ</rt></ruby>。”<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>自<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zì</rt></ruby><ruby>己<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>预<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yù</rt></ruby><ruby>备<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bèi</rt></ruby><ruby>车<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chē</rt></ruby><ruby>辆<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">liànɡ</rt></ruby>、<ruby>马<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>兵<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bīnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>又<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>派<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pài</rt></ruby><ruby>五<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>十<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>前<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qián</rt></ruby><ruby>头<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tou</rt></ruby><ruby>奔<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bēn</rt></ruby><ruby>走<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zǒu</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>父<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>亲<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qīn</rt></ruby><ruby>素<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sù</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>没<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">méi</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>使<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>忧<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yōu</rt></ruby><ruby>闷<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mēn</rt></ruby>，<ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>什<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shén</rt></ruby><ruby>么<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">me</rt></ruby><ruby>呢<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ne</rt></ruby>？”<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>甚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shèn</rt></ruby><ruby>俊<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jùn</rt></ruby><ruby>美<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">měi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>生<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>押<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yā</rt></ruby><ruby>沙<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shā</rt></ruby><ruby>龙<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>之<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>后<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hòu</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yà</rt></ruby><ruby>多<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">duō</rt></ruby><ruby>尼<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ní</rt></ruby><ruby>雅<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>洗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Xǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>鲁<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>雅<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>儿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>约<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yuē</rt></ruby><ruby>押<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yā</rt></ruby>，<ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>司<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sī</rt></ruby><ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yà</rt></ruby><ruby>比<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yà</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>商<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>议<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>二<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">èr</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>顺<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shùn</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby>，<ruby>帮<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>助<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhù</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>但<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Dàn</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>司<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sī</rt></ruby><ruby>撒<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Sā</rt></ruby><ruby>督<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dū</rt></ruby>、<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>何<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yē</rt></ruby><ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dà</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>儿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>比<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Bǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>拿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ná</rt></ruby><ruby>雅<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǎ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>先<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiān</rt></ruby><ruby>知<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>拿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Ná</rt></ruby><ruby>单<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dān</rt></ruby>、<ruby>示<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Shì</rt></ruby><ruby>每<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">měi</rt></ruby>、<ruby>利<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Lì</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>并<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Dà</rt></ruby><ruby>卫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>勇<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>士<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>顺<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shùn</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yà</rt></ruby><ruby>多<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">duō</rt></ruby><ruby>尼<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ní</rt></ruby><ruby>雅<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǎ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yí</rt></ruby><ruby>日<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yà</rt></ruby><ruby>多<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">duō</rt></ruby><ruby>尼<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ní</rt></ruby><ruby>雅<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>隐<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yǐn</rt></ruby><ruby>罗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">luó</rt></ruby><ruby>结<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jié</rt></ruby><ruby>旁<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pánɡ</rt></ruby>、<ruby>琐<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>希<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xī</rt></ruby><ruby>列<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">liè</rt></ruby><ruby>磐<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pán</rt></ruby><ruby>石<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">li</rt></ruby>，<ruby>宰<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">le</rt></ruby><ruby>牛<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">niú</rt></ruby><ruby>羊<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yánɡ</rt></ruby>、<ruby>肥<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">féi</rt></ruby><ruby>犊<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dú</rt></ruby>，<ruby>请<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qǐnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>诸<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhū</rt></ruby><ruby>弟<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>兄<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiōnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>王<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>众<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>并<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>王<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>臣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chén</rt></ruby><ruby>仆<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pú</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>犹<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yóu</rt></ruby><ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dà</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ren</rt></ruby>；
